parameters.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT $1::uuid AS pid, $2::text AS pctx
),
claims AS (
  SELECT cc.core_id, cc.key_label, cc.claim_text, cc.status, cc.locked, cc.confidence, cc.sensitivity, cc.visibility
  FROM core_claim cc, params p
  WHERE cc.speaker_id = p.pid
    AND cc.status IN ('approved', 'provisional')
    AND cc.sensitivity IN ('P2', 'P3')
    AND (cc.visibility = 'all'
      OR (cc.visibility = 'server' AND p.pctx = 'public')
      OR (cc.visibility = 'dm' AND p.pctx = 'private')
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN cc.locked THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    cc.confidence DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT * FROM claims
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL::uuid, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM claims);
